research_question: Which agent harness patterns should KRN use for bounded researcher work?
krn_decision: Decide whether KRN should add a typed research-pack artifact before adding long-running researcher workers.

source_budget.stop_condition: Stop after five primary or mechanism-bearing sources have been compared and KRN promotion targets are explicit.

source_universe.inclusion_reason: Local pinned source repositories reduce rereading and source drift.
Reviewed KRN memory selects relevant prior decisions.
Primary papers provide mechanisms and failure modes for agent harness design.

sources.title: SWE-agent paper
sources.why_included: Defines agent-computer interface mechanisms for coding agents.

sources.title: Agentless paper
sources.why_included: Counterexample showing simpler localization and repair can beat complex autonomy.

sources.title: Matt Pocock skills workflow
sources.why_included: Provides practitioner mechanisms for grill, issues, TDD, and review flow.

sources.title: KRN source bank manifest
sources.why_included: Defines local source-bank promotion rules for KRN.

mechanism_matrix.mechanism: Agent-facing artifacts should constrain the action space before autonomy increases.
mechanism_matrix.works_when: The artifact has a narrow schema and a parser used by downstream tools.
mechanism_matrix.fails_when: The artifact is a prose-only note that later agents reinterpret.
mechanism_matrix.krn_transfer: Create KrnResearchPack before spawning long-running researcher workers.
mechanism_matrix.proof_surface: Parser, CLI scaffold, known-bad fixture, and deterministic eval.

mechanism_matrix.mechanism: Deep research needs a fixed budget and keep/discard boundary.
mechanism_matrix.works_when: The question names a KRN decision and a stop condition before source work starts.
mechanism_matrix.fails_when: The agent browses until the answer sounds plausible.
mechanism_matrix.krn_transfer: Require source_budget and promotion_targets in every non-scaffolded pack.
mechanism_matrix.proof_surface: KrnResearchPack rejects ready_for_review packs below the selected source budget.

contradictions.conflict: Autonomous agents can explore broadly, while simpler localization-first workflows reduce noise.
contradictions.resolution: Use autonomy for source collection only after the output artifact is typed and reviewable.
contradictions.krn_decision: Add typed research packs before long-running researcher worker orchestration.

rejected_alternatives.alternative: Let the skill write free-form Markdown only.
rejected_alternatives.why_rejected: Free-form notes cannot be parsed by CLI, eval, MCP, or dashboard consumers.
rejected_alternatives.review_trigger: Reconsider only if a markdown parser becomes the source of truth.

decision_candidates.label: DECISION
decision_candidates.text: KRN should require a typed research pack before promoting deep-research conclusions.

promotion_targets.change: Promote only reviewed mechanisms, failure modes, and KRN proof surfaces.
promotion_targets.verification: Pack parses and release verifier confirms source budget and overclaim boundary.

next_action: Create the next vertical slice that runs a long-researcher worker against this typed scaffold.
interpretation_caveat: This example proves only research-pack contract shape. It does not prove that any future KRN worker improves research quality or productivity lift.
